plugins.name: miro
plugins.description: Secure access to Miro boards. Enables AI to read board context, create diagrams, and generate code with enterprise-grade security.

plugins.name: miro-tasks
plugins.description: Track your coding progress on a Miro board. Automatically syncs todos and task status to visual cards.

plugins.name: miro-research
plugins.description: Research any topic and visualize findings on Miro boards.

plugins.name: miro-review
plugins.description: Visual code reviews on Miro boards from GitHub PRs or local changes.

plugins.name: miro-spec
plugins.description: Extract and save Miro Specs to local files for AI-assisted planning and implementation.
